title: Manifest Maiden
description:
Manifest Maiden is an adult hide-and-seek game where the players are busty women. There are two teams: the hiders and hunters. The hiders must paint their bodies in order to camouflage themselves like an octopus or a chameleon would. Once the hiding time has ended, the hunters must find all of the hiders in order to win the game.

Painting is not just limited to the hiders, however. The hunters are also able to paint themselves, and they can save their hunting appearance for future games. Feel free to create masterpieces!

The game supports creating/joining public or friends-only lobbies. Players can communicate to each other using either text chat or voice chat (via Steam Voice) in the game. The host of each lobby has complete control over the game and the user-generated content in use.

User-Generated ContentThe game allows users to upload custom maps and characters to the Steam Workshop. Lobby hosts can pick and choose what custom content they wish to use, and all other players in the lobby will automatically and effortlessly download the content.
description_short: Manifest Maiden is a hide-and-seek game where you can paint busty girls to make them blend in with the environment! Either play as a hider, or be the hunter that finds the hidden girls. Have fun with your friends, random people online, or a mix of both!
